/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall -Wno-reorder -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/enkiTs/TaskScheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/enkiTs/TaskScheduler_c.cc.o CMakeFiles/runtime.dir/main.cc.o -o runtime
